I 규칙: VL preferred; else RIR; else RPE. Never apply more than one effort scale.
Use same resistance effort hierarchy after effective-load resolution.
Near-failure hold or severe tremor escalates functional curve one tier.
Drop height, landing quality and hard-contact density modify I/context; all contacts accumulate into the same unsided tissue state.

D_raw 공식: activeMinutes * densityFactor; replace with event count when reliable sensor/manual count exists
I 규칙: Maximum repeat test, RPE>=9 or dense hard decelerations select max-COD curve. Direction is context only; no left/right state.

D_raw 공식: distanceKm * terrainFactor; if distance absent use activeMinutes * paceClassFactor
I 규칙: Intervals/sprints and single-session spike increase I/timeScale; do not duplicate duration and distance.

D_raw 공식: activeMinutes * externalDensityFactor; use event densities to distribute dose by tissue channel
I 규칙: sRPE provides global I; strokes/jumps/decelerations route local dose rather than being blindly summed.
Maximal repeated smash invokes the longer overhead curve; racket-side is not a tissue-state dimension.
Max-intent fraction controls power/shoulder curve; throwing side is not a tissue-state dimension.
Grip and trunk effort are separate routing modifiers. Unilateral execution may change bounded context, but no left/right tissue state is created.

D_raw 공식: endRangeHoldSeconds or activeMinutes; no load-dose when only gentle motion is recorded
I 규칙: Gentle range work normally creates no fatigue debt; forceful end-range stretching routes to named tissue only.

D_raw 공식: not computed until movement is specified
I 규칙: Keep UNRESOLVED_GENERIC; never substitute zero or arbitrary tissue map.
